title: LONG HAIRED Rei IS NOW CANON CELEBRATION THREAD
display_title: LONG HAIRED Rei IS NOW CANON CELEBRATION THREAD
wikitext:
[]: LONG HAIRED Rei IS NOW CANON CELEBRATION THREAD             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Fri Aug 13, 2021 2:50 pm that is all

[]: Re: LONG HAIRED Rei IS NOW CANON CELEBRATION THREAD             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Aug 13, 2021 3:21 pm Yuuuup. Long hair Rei is a very nice aesthetic.

[]: Re: LONG HAIRED Rei IS NOW CANON CELEBRATION THREAD             Quote Post by Justacrazyguy » Fri Aug 13, 2021 4:06 pm The best thing to come out of the rebuilds, to be honest. With Asuka x Kensuke ship being a close second.

[]: Re: LONG HAIRED Rei IS NOW CANON CELEBRATION THREAD             Quote Post by ManureTruck » Fri Aug 13, 2021 5:41 pm Long-hair Rei is definitely my new thing for the time being as well, although she doesn't really replace the original Rei aesthetic. Justacrazyguy wrote: With Asuka x Kensuke ship being a close second.

[]: Re: LONG HAIRED Rei IS NOW CANON CELEBRATION THREAD             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Fri Aug 13, 2021 6:06 pm My reading of Kensuke was that Asuka lacked parents and Kensuke stepped in like the parental figure she desired and needed. Asuka often belittles Shinji for being irresponsible and not as useful as Kensuke is. This is further illustrated by Kensuke popping out of the doll that accompanied her throughout her lonely early years. Haven't read anything romantic either in that living situation. This is in stark contrast to the paternal figure NGE!Asuka wanted Kaji to be, but neither wanted or could fill for her.

[]: Re: LONG HAIRED Rei IS NOW CANON CELEBRATION THREAD             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Fri Aug 13, 2021 8:12 pm Long haired Rei is my new religion! And I also see that Kenken is a paternal figure to Asuka, I couldn't relate any romantic moments between them. But i think this thread is not the correct place to discuss that.

[]: Re: LONG HAIRED Rei IS NOW CANON CELEBRATION THREAD             Quote Post by Justacrazyguy » Sat Aug 14, 2021 7:26 am Yeah, I didn't mean to imply it's a definitive, extremely obvious romantic pairing (hell, I don't see the Shinji scenes with Mari as that, for example), it's just that I personally like the idea of her settling down with a more mature partner, so I'm sticking with it in my head. In fact, as far as I'm concerned, Shinji ending up with Rei is still a possibility, and I think that's one of the beauties of this last movie, it just leaves this open ending and you can do with it whatever you want. The story is over, the fans can take over.

[]: Re: LONG HAIRED Rei IS NOW CANON CELEBRATION THREAD             Quote Post by Natalie the Cat » Sat Aug 14, 2021 10:13 am I didn’t get any specific vibe from Asuka’s relationship with Kensuke, but she does hang out in his house naked and the bit with the video camera was very flirty, so I can see why people would think there are implications there.

[]: Re: LONG HAIRED Rei IS NOW CANON CELEBRATION THREAD             Quote Post by Raikyu » Sat Aug 14, 2021 10:44 am Tbh, I got more vibes of a father-daughter relationship. But we're talking about EVA, and "there are as many truths as people"

[]: Re: LONG HAIRED Rei IS NOW CANON CELEBRATION THREAD             Quote Post by Tankred » Thu Dec 09, 2021 3:14 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: that is all

[]: Re: LONG HAIRED Rei IS NOW CANON CELEBRATION THREAD             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Fri Dec 10, 2021 2:18 pm Justacrazyguy wrote: Yeah, I didn't mean to imply it's a definitive, extremely obvious romantic pairing (hell, I don't see the Shinji scenes with Mari as that, for example), it's just that I personally like the idea of her settling down with a more mature partner, so I'm sticking with it in my head. In fact, as far as I'm concerned, Shinji ending up with Rei is still a possibility, and I think that's one of the beauties of this last movie, it just leaves this open ending and you can do with it whatever you want. The story is over, the fans can take over.
